name: Beaumont Inn Kentucky Hot Brown
recipeIngredient: Salt and white pepper - to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter and add flour. Whisk together.
2. Slowly cook for 5 minutes, whisking constantly.
3. Gradually whisk in cream and milk. Continue cooking until heated through.
4. Stir in the grated Swiss cheese until melted.
5. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
6. Simmer sauce for an additional 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. The sauce should be very thick.
7. Quarter the toast and arrange it in an oven-safe dish.
8. Top the toast with turkey slices and halved tomatoes.
9. Pour the prepared sauce over everything, ensuring it is well covered.
10. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes until heated through.
11. Garnish with sliced bacon before serving.
Note: This regional favorite originated at Louisville's Brown Hotel earlier in the century. Variations often include adding country ham and substituting a cheddar sauce. The version below is intended to closely replicate the original recipe as offered on the lunch menu.
